name: @btraut/station
description: Repo-scoped single-user issue tracker with pluggable backend foundation

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:e2e: vitest run tests/e2e/**/*.test.ts tests/lifecycle.test.ts tests/deps.test.ts tests/labels-filter.test.ts tests/scope.test.ts tests/backend.test.ts tests/version.test.ts
scripts.ci:test:unit: node scripts/run-with-budget.mjs 10 unit npm run test:unit
scripts.ci:test:integration: node scripts/run-with-budget.mjs 20 integration npm run test:integration
scripts.ci:test:e2e: node scripts/run-with-budget.mjs 90 e2e npm run test:e2e
scripts.ci:test:smoke: node scripts/run-with-budget.mjs 15 smoke npm run test:smoke
